_comment: Curated agent capabilities for Cohort. Remove this file to show all tools.

descriptions.comms_service: Send emails, manage calendar events, and post to social media with human approval gates
descriptions.web_search: Search the internet for current information using SerpAPI or Serper
descriptions.youtube_service: Search YouTube videos, get metadata, and extract chapters
descriptions.intel_scheduler: Monitor RSS feeds for tech trends, score articles, and generate briefings
descriptions.content_monitor_scheduler: Discover content on Reddit and forums, draft social media posts for your brand
descriptions.document_processor: Summarize PDFs and analyze documents using local AI models
descriptions.health_monitor: Monitor system services, websites, and API connectivity with alerts
descriptions.llm_manager: Manage local AI models — install, remove, and monitor Ollama models
